author: daniel-fiuk
description: Upload your own maps and plant pins on important locations, each linking back to your notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Simple Map

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
(Technically a rerelease, renaming from "fantasy map" to "simple map")
# Simple Map 1.0.0 Release
Are you a writer, a world builder, or a really dedicated Dungeon Master or note taker? Do you want to manage and locate your notes on a map of your choosing? Introducing Simple Map for Obsidian! Upload any image to your Obsidian vault and create an interactive map where you can link to notes that call back to a specific location.
releases.name: Simple Map 1.0.0 Release
